parameters: The Prison of Warning... A hell on earth, where the defeated were
sucked into the darkness of despair. Had things gone differently,
perhaps Deathpolca and the others would have been sent there.
The captured slaves came up to the surface, freed from that
world of pain and death. As they stood under the open sky,
The Kingdom of Bohelos extended its protection to the slaves,
the demons welcoming them with open arms. Their connection
was one that transcended the boundaries of race.
Lily Killer suddenly brought up her days in the Execution Dungeon.
It was too horrible for words, and all her friends could do was hold
her close as they shared in her pain.
Deathpolca trembled with anger at how she wasn't able to protect
her friend. No one could stop the wave of rage that overcame her.
\#The Prison of Warning is destroyed by the Magic Cannon.
▼ーーーーーー移動関連ーーーーーー▼
▼ーーーーーー実行関連ーーーーーー▼
Ultra Beasts... The biggest, strongest creatures on the continent.
It remains unclear even now why these powerful beasts would hand
over control of the continent to a race they could so easily crush.
There's no way of knowing why Ultra Beast Gon chose this moment
to appear, but in the end...
The joint effort between demons and humans succeeded in driving
the Ultra Beast from its territory, a great achievement that had no
precedent in all of recorded history.
\#The Palo Mountain Range falls to the demons.
